prompt: Create a dreamy fantasy illustration of a colossal translucent humpback whale swimming through deep outer space as if it were an ocean. The whale fills most of a vertical portrait canvas, angled from lower left to upper right, with its head on the left and its tail curling upward on the right into a graceful splash-like arc. Make the whale’s body glassy and bioluminescent in luminous cyan, turquoise, royal blue, violet, and soft pink, with glowing speckles like stars inside its skin. Inside the transparent whale’s belly, show a vibrant coral reef ecosystem with exactly 5 prominent coral clusters: one large pale pink branching coral near the center, one pink-and-yellow anemone-like coral on the right, one soft blue coral mound beneath the center, one lavender-pink reef patch near the lower left, and one pale peach coral fan near the mid-lower body. Add exactly 11 small fish below the whale, swimming in a loose arc, colored cream, pale yellow, light blue, cyan, and orange. Add exactly 3 jellyfish around the whale: one glowing jellyfish to the left above the head, one small jellyfish near the upper center above the whale’s back, and one tiny jellyfish at the right edge beside the tail. Surround the whale with many sparkling bubbles and water droplets, especially along the arcing tail and lower right fin, but keep them delicate and jewel-like. The background is a dark navy star field with countless tiny stars and a few larger twinkling starbursts, creating a cosmic underwater atmosphere. Style: highly detailed ethereal digital painting, delicate dissolving outlines, soft gradients, transparent watercolor glow, luminous rim light, magical ocean-in-space mood, no text, no border, no watermark.
